S.FORM: Jim Baechtold sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Jim Baechtold, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im Œ≤ae ¶~ ®ƒßtol* s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj **, *im Œ≤ae ¶~ ®ƒßtol*, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
